fields.value: 3 SKUs · 30 units — Pick Of The Patch lead SKUs

closingText.text: O-50013 is Magnolia's biggest pre-book — 30 units of Pick Of The Patch lead SKUs, locked for the Sep 2026 ship window. Factory ETA from the supplier is confirmed. Nothing to do here except watch the inventory feed in late August. Want me to set a nudge for the week before the ship date?
